text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Asahi Hai F.S., Mejiro Ryan sits
in the stands with a solemn look on her face. It
seems that her recent loss is still eating away at
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racked with self-doubt, Mejiro Ryan feels that
her performance was unworthy of the Mejiro
family name, but Mejiro Bright believes in her
potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai F.S. marks Ines Fujin's first G1 race.
Even though the race is about to start, I can't
shake my concerns about the limited prep time
we had.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin sees through my awkward attempts to
compensate for my concerns, but ends up easing
my worries with some words of encouragement of
her own. For now, I have to trust in her strength!
